name: conversation_digest
purpose: Compress prior conversation history and the latest user message into separate summaries.

examples.reason: Conversation covers a multi-step debugging session; latest message asks for a test run.
examples.history_summary: User is debugging a TypeScript import error in a Node ESM project. Claude identified a missing .js extension in the import path and suggested a fix.
examples.latest_user_message_summary: User wants to run the tests now to confirm the fix worked.

examples.reason: First message in the conversation; no prior history to summarize.
examples.latest_user_message_summary: User asked how to center a div in CSS.

fallback.reason: Classifier failed; no conversation summary generated.
